membership_no.text: ทะเบียนผู้กู้

root.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as memname ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description ,substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live (sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date),1,3) as age_coll ,pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card ) as id_card ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_long( sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no ) as position ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no) as group_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_pres(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no) as member_address ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount as loan_request_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount)::double precision) as loan_request_amount_thai ,si_security_user.user_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no from sc_lon_m_req_coll , sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , si_security_user where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id = si_security_user.user_id and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type in ('20','21','22','24') /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = '6520000410' order by sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no
